item.title:
OfficialPDC: PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 28min THAT'S A WRAP!
Confirmation of tonight's results as round one of the European Darts Gra
item.description:
PDC Darts @OfficialPDC · 28min THAT'S A WRAP!
Confirmation of tonight's results as round one of the European Darts Grand Prix comes to a close.
Join us from 1300 CEST (1200 BST) tomorrow, where second round action gets underway at the Glaspalast!
http:// bit.ly/PDCTVLive #ET5 2 2 31 7 mil

item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 32min Niko Springer has thrashed compatriot Robin Masino 6-1 to complete day one of the European Dart
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 32min Niko Springer has thrashed compatriot Robin Masino 6-1 to complete day one of the European Darts Grand Prix in Sindelfingen.
The seeds enter the action tomorrow with Gian van Veen and Michael van Gerwen taking the top two seedings, and reigning champion Gary Anderson makes his Mostrar más 1 140
